items.headline: How to Maximize Your Retirement Portfolio with These Top-Ranked Dividend Stocks
items.summary: The traditional retirement planning approaches no longer cover all expenses in nest egg years. So what can retirees do? Thankfully, there are alternative investments that provide steady, higher-rate income streams to replace dwindling bond yields.

items.headline: Devon Energy (DVN) Maps Out 2026 Production After The Coterra Merger
items.summary: Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) has issued new production guidance for 2026 following its merger with Coterra Energy. The company outlined how the combined business plans to concentrate capital on high-return assets, with emphasis on the Permian Basin. The roadmap also highlights a continued focus on shareholder returns through dividends and share repurchase activity. Devon Energy now looks different after absorbing Coterra Energy, and the latest 2026 production guidance shows how the combined...

items.headline: Western Midstream Expands Permian Water Recycling With New Treatment Plant
items.summary: Western Midstream and a consortium of major oil producers have commissioned a second produced-water treatment facility in the Permian Basin designed to significantly expand freshwater recovery from oilfield wastewater.
